title: lyonia buchii
intro: Lyonia buchii, also known as the Swamp Sweetbay, is a species of flowering plant in the heath family (Ericaceae). It is native to the southeastern United States and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation and alleviating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. Lyonia buchii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and is often used in folk remedies.
